name: easyoref-monorepo
description: EasyOref — Real-time Israeli civil defense alerts → Telegram

scripts.publish: npm run build && npm publish -w packages/shared --access public --no-provenance && npm publish -w packages/agent --access public --no-provenance && npm publish -w packages/gramjs --access public --no-provenance && npm publish -w packages/cli --access public --no-provenance && npm publish -w packages/bot --access public --no-provenance
scripts.release: npm run test:ci && npm run bump:patch && git push --tags && npm run publish && npm run rpi
scripts.release:minor: npm run test:ci && npm run bump:minor && git push --tags && npm run publish && npm run rpi
scripts.release:major: npm run test:ci && npm run bump:major && git push --tags && npm run publish && npm run rpi
scripts.rpi: ssh pi@raspberrypi.local "nohup bash -c 'easyoref update > /tmp/easyoref-update.log 2>&1' &" && echo '✅ RPi update started — tail /tmp/easyoref-update.log on RPi for progress'

author: Mikhail Kogan <kogan.mikhail@gmail.com>
